title: Arrow Functions (PHP 7.4+)
description: Write concise functions with arrow syntax.

slides.title: Arrow Functions: Even Shorter
slides.content:
# `fn` Keyword

Arrow functions provide a shorter syntax for anonymous functions. They automatically capture variables from the parent scope by value (no need for `use`).

Syntax: `fn($parameter) => expression`

```php
$add = fn($a, $b) => $a + $b;
echo $add(3, 4); // 7
```

They can only contain a **single expression**, which is returned automatically.

slides.title: Comparison

quizData.explanation: The expression `$x > 5` evaluates to true when $x=10, so the arrow function returns true.
